analysis.reasoning: Core message: A neutral informational tweet stating that Secretary Pompeo addressed several topics (COVID-19, U.S.-Afghan peace process, ICC, WIPO election, China, Iran). It lists subjects without value judgments or claims. Evaluation by narrative: US1 (honorable tradition) – not promoted; there is no reference to values, legacy, or historical feats. US2 (admirable society) – not promoted; no mention of civil society, diversity, companies, or heroes. US3 (hostile enemies) – not promoted; although China and Iran are mentioned, the tweet does not characterize them as hostile or immoral. US4 (force for good) – not promoted; mentioning the U.S.-Afghan peace process could imply peacemaking, but the tweet does not claim support for human rights or active benevolence—it's purely descriptive. US5 (great international ally) – not promoted; no praise of allies or support statements. US6 (at the forefront) – not promoted; no leadership, superiority, or leading role is asserted. Conclusion: The tweet does not promote any listed narrative.
